channel.title: Task-Scheduling on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Task-Scheduling on Pi Stack

item.title: XXL-JOB vs PowerJob vs Apache DolphinScheduler: Distributed Task Scheduling Guide 2026
item.description: When your application grows beyond a single server, cron jobs on individual machines become impossible to manage. You need a centralized, distributed task scheduling platform that can handle retries, sharding, failure alerting, and horizontal scaling — all from a single web dashboard.
